title: The MADI AI Universe
description: Your flagship adventure map! Explore the entire MADI AI Universe containing Pipeline Peaks, Revenue Jungle, and Temple of Automation.

maker.name: Madi AI Creative Team
maker.bio: Building the future of autonomous revenue engines.

controls.mouse: Hover regions to inspect, and Click to load that game!

instructions: Rotate the interactive 3D globeworld to inspect different zones of the MADI AI universe. Click any glowing sector to immediately play that specific game!
